revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:中臣大島); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fujiwara_no_%C5%8Cshima here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fujiwara_no_%C5%8Cshima for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:28, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96408932 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:28, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:中臣大島 | revid=96408932 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=YOSHI438およびYOSHI438/同一人物と思われる利用者による新規作成記事|date1=2010年3月17日 }}
